recommendations.title: Cleveland Abduction
recommendations.overview: A single mother becomes Ariel Castro's first kidnapping victim, and finds herself trapped in his home with two other women for 11 years.

recommendations.title: Pride
recommendations.overview: In 1984, a group of LGBT activists decide to raise money to support the National Union of Mineworkers during their lengthy strike. There is only one problem: the Union seems embarrassed to receive their support.

recommendations.title: Non Negotiable
recommendations.overview: Hostage negotiator Alan Bender is called to rescue the president from a kidnapping, only to find himself also mediating to save his wife and marriage.

recommendations.title: How to Blow Up a Pipeline
recommendations.overview: A crew of young environmental activists execute a daring mission to sabotage an oil pipeline.

recommendations.title: A World Without Thieves
recommendations.overview: A con-team couple head west after taking a city businessman for his BMW. But an encounter with a naive young carpenter traveling home with his life savings challenges their fate as thieves.

recommendations.title: Disappearance at Clifton Hill
recommendations.overview: Following the death of her mother, a young woman returns home to Niagara Falls and becomes entangled in the memory of a kidnapping she claims to have witnessed as a child.

recommendations.title: Who's Harry Crumb?
recommendations.overview: Harry Crumb is a bumbling and inept private investigator who is hired to solve the kidnapping of a young heiress which he's not expected to solve because his employer is the mastermind behind the kidnapping.

recommendations.title: A Wolf at the Door
recommendations.overview: Love turns to hate and panic breeds suspicion as two parents deal with the kidnapping of their child.

recommendations.title: BPM (Beats per Minute)
recommendations.overview: Paris, in the early 1990s: a group of young activists is desperately tied to finding the cure against an unknown lethal disease. They target the pharmaceutical labs that are retaining potential cures, and multiply direct actions, with the hope of sav

recommendations.title: Racing Extinction
recommendations.overview: An unlikely team of activists and innovators hatches a bold mission to save endangered species.
